nodes.name: Mussau triller
nodes.summary: Mussau triller（Lalage conjuncta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mussau triller。

nodes.name: Mussau triller
nodes.summary: The Mussau triller (Lalage conjuncta) is a smaller member of the cuckooshrike family, Campephagidae. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the varied triller. It is found on the St Matthias Islands in the Bismarck Archipelago. Photographed and sound-recorded for the first time in 2024, the species is now thought to be restricted to the centre of the island and may be at risk due to logging. References Taylor, P.B. 2005. Family Campephagidae (cuckoo-shrikes). Pages 40–122 in J. del Hoyo, A. Elliott, and D.A. Christie (editors), Handbook of the birds of the world. Volume 10. Cuckoo-shrikes to thrushes. Lynx Edicions. Barcelona.

nodes.name: Lalage
nodes.summary: Lalage（Lalage）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如斑鸣鹃鵙、萨摩亚鸣鹃鵙、长尾鸣鹃鵙等20种鸟类。
